Ready or Not (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,714,231Details
International Box Office $27,988,764
Worldwide Box Office $56,702,995
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,761,618
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $672,133
Total $4,433,751
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A young bride joins her new husband’s rich, eccentric family in a time-honored tradition that turns into a lethal game with everyone fighting for their survival.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,015,590 (27.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.58 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,855 opening theaters/2,998 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,491,502

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 21st, 2019 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: August 23rd, 2019 (Wide), released as Nevesta na zabitie (Slovakia)
August 23rd, 2019 (Wide), released as Krvavá nevěsta (Czech Republic)
August 23rd, 2019 (Wide), released as Докато смъртта ни раздели (Bulgaria)
August 23rd, 2019 (Wide), released as Slėpynės (Ready Or Not) (Lithuania)
August 23rd, 2019 (Wide) (Portugal)
Video Release: November 26th, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, bloody images, language throughout, and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2581 (Cert #52099), 6/5/2019)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Ready or Not
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Faustian, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Romance
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Vinson Pictures, Radio Silence, Mythology Entertainment, TSG Entertainment, Fox Searchlight Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
